title: The Best of Hanoi & Sapa Vietnam Experience 2026
details: Highlights: Cat Cat Village, Fansipan Cable Car, Rong May Glass Bridge, Mega World Hanoi, Train Street, Quang Phu Cau Incense Village, Trang An Boat Cave Tour, and Ninh Binh Province. Discover Vietnam’s northern highlands, cultural heritage, and scenic landscapes in one unforgettable journey.

itinerary.day_title: Day 1: Manila – Hanoi – Sapa – Cat Cat Village (L/D)
itinerary.day_details: Arrival in Hanoi. Meet and greet with tour guide, then depart to Sapa. Lunch and hotel check-in. Afternoon visit to Cat Cat Village and Cat Cat Waterfalls. Stop at Moana Coffee and Sapa Cathedral Church. Dinner at a local restaurant. Flight: MNL–HAN 5J744 05:15–07:40.
After breakfast, ride the cable car to Fansipan. Take the mountain train to the summit. Lunch, then visit Rong May Glass Bridge. Return to hotel for dinner. Free time at Sapa Market Square.

Breakfast at hotel, then drive back to Hanoi. Stop at Bamboo Shop for shopping. Lunch en route. Afternoon visit to Mega World (boat ride fee excluded). Return to Hanoi City Center. Visit Train Street, Old Quarter, and Dong Xuan Market.

itinerary.day_title: Day 4: Hanoi – Quang Phu Cau – Trang An – Ninh Binh – Hanoi (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, visit Quang Phu Cau Incense Village. Transfer to Ninh Binh and enjoy lunch. Take a boat trip in Trang An to explore Sang Cave, Toi Cave, Ba Giot Cave, and Nau Ruou. Return to Hanoi.
Breakfast at hotel. Transfer to airport for departure to Manila. Flight: HAN–MNL 5J747 02:30–06:40. Home sweet home!

inclusions: Full board meals as per itinerary
Private coach for airport and tour transfers
Fully loaded tours as per itinerary
exclusions: Rates subject to airline fare changes
extra_details: Second downpayment: ₱7,000 one month after reservation
Full payment required 45 days before travel date
Itineraries are subject to change without prior notice due to local circumstances
